section.heading: Permits or leases of certain lands in Okla­homa; retention of royalties

content.p: The Secretary of the Interior is directed to retain in his custody until otherwise directed by law the 12½ per centum and other royalties heretofore or hereafter received by him in pursuance of section 233 11 See References in Text note below. of this title.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 233 of this title, referred to in text, was repealed by act June 22, 1948, ch. 605, § 3, 62 Stat. 576.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 85, 41 Stat. 437, known as the Mineral Leasing Act, which comprises this chapter.
